object_a.label: plant
object_a.description: potted green houseplant on small table near front of sofa
object_a.long_form_open_description: A medium-sized leafy green houseplant (possibly a dracaena or similar) in a pot placed on a small dark table beside the sofa's front corner. Leaves are long and hanging; pot is dark and the plant appears healthy.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on a small side table adjacent to the front left corner of the sofa, near the base of the staircase
object_a.object_text_short: potted green houseplant on small table near front of sofa
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | A medium-sized leafy green houseplant (possibly a dracaena or similar) in a pot placed on a small dark table beside the sofa's front corner. Leaves are long and hanging; pot is dark and the plant appears healthy.

object_b.label: rug
object_b.description: wall-to-wall light beige carpet in living area
object_b.long_form_open_description: A light beige, low-pile wall-to-wall carpet covers the living area floor from foreground to the threshold of the kitchen. The texture appears uniform and slightly worn in walking paths.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Covers floor under sofa, between sofa and fireplace, extending toward the kitchen island
